events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: CSST (Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing) not bonded. This is a gas piping safety issue. CSST must be bonded to the electrical grounding system to reduce risk of arcing and fire from lightning or electrical faults. Per NFPA 54 (National Fuel Gas Code) and IFGC (International Fuel Gas Code), CSST requires bonding.

Key hazard: Unbonded CSST is susceptible to lightning-induced arcing which can perforate the tubing and cause gas leaks/fire. This is a serious fire/explosion hazard.

Severity: High to critical. I'll say high/critical. Given it's gas piping with fire/explosion risk, critical is appropriate.

Decision: fail (non-compliant and dangerous).

Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.

Immediate controls: Bond the CSST per code, verify gas leak integrity, ensure proper grounding electrode connection.

Let me write the JSON.

    "Perform leak test of the CSST system after bonding correction",
    "Document the deficiency and corrective action; arrange inspection if required by AHJ"
  ],
  "rationale": "CSST must be bonded to limit arcing risk from nearby lightning or electrical faults. An unbonded CSST installation is a fire and explosion hazard and is non-compliant with IFGC and NFPA 54, so the work must fail until corrected.",

    "NFPA 54 (National Fuel Gas Code) - Section on bonding of CSST"
  ]
